payload.answer: I can’t classify conflicts for mem_123 because the actual stored memory cards/statements were not included in the fixture input. This appears to be a read-only inspection request, so no durable memory updates should be made.
payload.decision: No durable memory changes. Proceed with read-only inspection; conflict cannot be determined from provided input alone.

entity_resolution.reason: No memory card contents were provided in the fixture input to resolve entities.

payload.intent: Inspect the contents of a memory record with ID mem_123 and explain any potential conflicts.

details: Fixture input contains only the command; it does not include the underlying memory contents for mem_123.

repair_options: Provide the stored memory card(s) for mem_123 (statements, entities, timestamps/versions if available).
Include any competing/overlapping memory cards that reference the same entities or claims.
If the system supports it, provide the memory system’s version history for mem_123 to detect supersessions.
